image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science reveals the hidden truth about the incubation period.
Context visual: The incubation period is the time between exposure to a pathogen and the onset of symptoms.
Escalation visual: This can vary widely—days, weeks, even months—based on the disease.
Evidence visual: For example, the flu can show symptoms in just one to four days, while COVID-19 might take up to 14 days.
Payoff visual: Understanding this helps in early detection and containment of diseases.
Cta visual: Curious about more scientific insights? Follow for more!
